programmes.show_description: Riotous early 70s comedy in which an audacious cat burglar steals more than his female victims' jewellery. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
5/8. Superfans bid for Nike trainers and Oasis lyrics hand-written by Noel. A prized work by sculptor Anish Kapoor and vintage luggage with a history also go under the hammer.
5/5. The castle transforms into a magical winter wonderland, as the team wrestle their biggest-ever tree and butler Louis gets very merry hosting a cocktail making master class. Last in series.
2/8. Stefan examines the differing conditions under which hens lay eggs. Sian asks how effective at probiotic drinks really are. Own-brand cereals vs. the best-known brands.

7/35. Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull are in Burton-on-Trent to design a Moroccan-inspired space for Tariq, Kim and their children as a nod to Tariq's north African heritage
Jazzy Whipps is the UK's biggest deaf influencer - but success brings trolling. It takes courage and resilience to be Jazzy. Funded and supported by Together TV and BSLBT.
Tom visits salt marshes in Essex and cooks up chicken and chips. Not to mention the orange and honey cake. 6/10
6/12. Carianne takes a bull to the Oban Highland Show. The Barclays are up all hours as they start lambing. Rachel and Camy gather in their ewes for an important pregnancy scan.
7/12. Rachel and Camy prepare to welcome the Park Cheviot lambs. Nikki and Ollie's rabbit-breeding programme bears fruit. Robert heads to market to sell previous year's calves.
8/12. Jenni moves her alpacas to their new arena. The MacDonalds organise a massive breakfast run for their pregnant cows. Nikki and Ollie invest in a new honesty shack.
9/12. Carianne searches for the missing mother of a newborn calf. Rachel and Camy are on the hills tending to their Cheviots. John and Heather help to deliver their Beltex lambs.
Action. World War II. Allied commandos are parachuted into North Africa on a mission to infiltrate and hold an Axis-held fort until reinforcements arrive. Lee Van Cleef stars.
Comedy. The story of Great Train Robber Buster Edwards, a small-timer who fell in with more ambitious thieves. Phil Collins and Julie Walters star.
It's Christmas Eve and six lonely people are looking to grab an elusive slice of enjoyment. Who better to contact than an escort agency. Contains sex scenes and distressing scenes.
A playboy astrologer has to prove his alibi for a years-old robbery. With Mary Millington and Diana Dors. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
1/8. Suffolk boatyard specialists Mary and Simon's dream is a futuristic aquatic pod. They're experts in their aquatic field, but have they taken on more than they can handle?
2/8. Alan and Val put their savings on the line for a high-tech boat to help them spend time with their family. But first they need to learn how to live on the water.

8/35. Charlie and Flo are in Kingswinford to create a Mediterranean family garden that conjures up magical honeymoon memories for Natalie and Matthew.
Tom looks at Anglo-Indian cuisine, making oven pakora and chicken tikka. 7/10
Scottish-born actor Alan Cumming explores the picturesque Outer Hebrides of Scotland, touring the Western Isles from Barra to Stornoway on Lewis, Eriskay and the Callanish stones.
Ronnie Barker stars as General Futtock, who has a motley group of guests stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Contains 70s social attitudes.
Action. Would-be journalist Sonya Winter investigates the Assassination Bureau, a mysterious organization. Ollie Reed and Diana Rigg star.
In 1944 France, a group of escaped American military prisoners volunteer to steal a German V2 rocket warhead for the Allies. Wartime action starring Bo Svenson.
Bawdy seventies sketch comedy film starring a bevy of British talent from Bruce Forsyth and Harry Secombe to Joan Simms and June Whitfield. Contains 70s social attitudes.
Stories of people who have experienced infidelity, the reasons why people stray outside their relationship and if a relationship can ever survive.
Helen Mirren stars as a sex worker who begins an affair with a shady colleague at their high-class London cabaret. Can their relationship survive? Contains sexual scenes.
